subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have desired to make mention of him who was named Muhammad Husayn, and to herald unto him the Wronged One's acceptance of him from this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نذکر من سمی بمحمد قبل حسین و نبشره باقبال المظلوم الیه من هذا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
